name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem or unexpected behavior with the Speedrun Reset Tool
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: 

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Add save file(s) using the **Add Save File** button.  
2. Attempt to delete using **P + L** or **Delete Selected**.  
3. Describe exactly what happens.

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- OS (e.g., Windows 10/11):  
- Speedrun Reset Tool version:  
- .NET SDK version (if known):

## Additional Context

Any other details or context about the problem.
